title: Fix the Crashing User Lookup
description: A FastAPI user directory crashes with an unhandled KeyError when looking up a user that doesn't exist, instead of returning a proper 404. Fix the lookup so missing users are handled gracefully.
learning_objective: Error handling and HTTP semantics — understanding why an unhandled exception is a bug (not just an inconvenience), and how to map application state (missing data) to the correct HTTP status code.
